title: Ashes Beneath Black Hollow
summary: The Ashbound Wanderer wakes under the ruined belfry of Black Hollow, follows the archivist's lantern into the crypt, restores three violet relic shards, opens the iron gate, and defeats the Ash Warlock. The victory closes the first chapter while leaving the wider world unresolved.

quests.title: Wake at the Ruined Belfry
quests.objective: Cross the first crypt chamber and survive the skeleton patrol.

quests.title: Follow the Archivist's Lantern
quests.objective: Speak with the archivist beside the cracked wall and learn why the gate burns.

quests.title: Gather the Violet Shards
quests.objective: Recover the three relic shards scattered through Black Hollow.

quests.title: Open the Iron Gate
quests.objective: Use the restored relic to break the gate seal.

quests.title: Defeat the Ash Warlock
quests.objective: Enter the ember-veined arena and banish the warlock.

storyBeats.speaker: Narrator
storyBeats.line: The bell above Black Hollow tolls once, though its iron tongue is gone.

storyBeats.speaker: Archivist Mael
storyBeats.line: Every sealed gate keeps a wound alive. Bring me the violet shards, and the crypt will remember its shape.

storyBeats.speaker: Relic
storyBeats.line: The three shards hum as one and cast a path through the old ward.

storyBeats.speaker: Archivist Mael
storyBeats.line: The gate yields. Beyond it, the ash that speaks has borrowed a human voice.

storyBeats.speaker: Ash Warlock
storyBeats.line: The Hollow is a door, wanderer. You have only opened it from the wrong side.

storyBeats.speaker: Narrator
storyBeats.line: Dawn reaches the belfry stones. Black Hollow falls silent, and three roads wait outside the graveyard.

openThreads.hook: The Ash Warlock served a ruler beneath the Northern Citadel.
Archivist Mael recognizes the Wanderer's scar and avoids naming the Hollow Oath.
The completed chapter unlocks three possible next paths: citadel, marsh, or ruined coast.
